'''hafulu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mnemotechnist|mnemotechnist]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-f-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mnemotechnist|mnemotechnist]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| hafulu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæfilith|hæfilith]] || [[word:hæfilij|hæfilij]] || [[word:hæfilish|hæfilish]] || [[word:hæfili|hæfili]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hafufuluth|hafufuluth]] || [[word:hafufuluj|hafufuluj]] || [[word:hafufulush|hafufulush]] || [[word:hafufulu|hafufulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hafuluth|hafuluth]] || [[word:hafuluj|hafuluj]] || [[word:hafulush|hafulush]] || [[word:hafulu|hafulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hafufluth|hafufluth]] || [[word:hafufluj|hafufluj]] || [[word:hafuflush|hafuflush]] || [[word:hafufluf|hafufluf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hafuluthu|hafuluthu]] || [[word:hafuluju|hafuluju]] || [[word:hafulushu|hafulushu]] || [[word:hafuluku|hafuluku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hafuluth|hafuluth]] || [[word:hafuluj|hafuluj]] || [[word:hafulush|hafulush]] || [[word:hafulu|hafulu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hafuluthul|hafuluthul]] || [[word:hafulujul|hafulujul]] || [[word:hafulushul|hafulushul]] || [[word:hafulukul|hafulukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hafuluthuthu|hafuluthuthu]] || [[word:hafulujuju|hafulujuju]] || [[word:hafulushushu|hafulushushu]] || [[word:hafuluku|hafuluku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hafuluthun|hafuluthun]] || [[word:hafulujun|hafulujun]] || [[word:hafulushun|hafulushun]] || [[word:hafulukun|hafulukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hafuluthuoro|hafuluthuoro]] || [[word:hafulujuoro|hafulujuoro]] || [[word:hafulushuoro|hafulushuoro]] || [[word:hafulukuoro|hafulukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
